Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs 
WHERE bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state IN ('CO', 'NM') AND (bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state) IN (SELECT bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs 
WHERE bs.upgrade IN (1, 2) AND bs.applicability = true GROUP BY bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state 
HAVING count(distinct(bs.upgrade)) = 2)) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/039db9c09ab834853e7c5321e4410e98c61e459519533f795de5e8887dba975e/6bd24e13-2ffc-44d6-a30f-5b9d8398fde7/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
